false_positives.what_happened: epiworld.hpp is an AMALGAMATED single-header build concatenated from the include/epiworld/*.hpp sources. So (a) within-file hits are repeated template/model boilerplate inside the amalgamation and (b) cross-file hits are header sources vs their own concatenated copy in epiworld.hpp -- a generated artifact, not authored duplication.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: detect amalgamated single-header (size + 'auto-generated/single-header' banner, or path == include base concatenation) and exclude it from cross-file comparison against its own sources.

note: Amalgamated single-header (epiworld.hpp) vs its include/ sources. Generated. sccs=0.
